summary: Verified the ADR 0082 remote build execution gateway against the real docker-build-lv3 route, updated the build-server contract to use the Proxmox host jump path, and backfilled rsync into the build guest baseline.

verification.observed: An SSH probe through `ops@100.118.189.95` to `ops@10.10.10.30` returned the remote hostname `docker-build-lv3`, confirming the controller-reachable path used by the build gateway.
Installed `rsync` on `docker-build-lv3` and added it to `inventory/host_vars/proxmox_florin.yml` so future guest convergence preserves the build-gateway sync dependency.
`make check-build-server` completed successfully against `/home/ops/builds/proxmox_florin_server`, including SSH connectivity, remote workspace verification, and rsync dry-run sync.

notes: The live build VM is currently reached through the Proxmox host jump path because it does not expose a separately reachable controller-side Tailscale address.
The verified remote workspace root is under `/home/ops/builds` rather than `/opt/builds` so the non-root `ops` account can own the synchronized checkout.
